name: parallect-cloud
description: Claude Code plugin for parallect.ai (hosted). Runs multi-provider deep research on Parallect-managed infra (Perplexity, Gemini, OpenAI, Grok, Anthropic) and synthesizes results with cross-referenced citations, typed claims, confidence scores, and follow-on suggestions. OAuth-gated, paid per job. For BYOK / self-hosted, see parallect-cli on PyPI (parallect-local plugin coming soon).
